calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Pro Tem Judge Seymour Seidscher, Clerks: P. Dias/E. Bura, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Robert G. Burton, Esq., for Plaintiff: Joey Jordan, was sworn and examined
James F. Hannawalt, Esq., Deputy City Attorney for Defendant City & County of San Francisco.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulated settlement subject to the approval by all necessary Boards and Commission.
In exchange of $500.00, Plaintiff will dismiss case with prejudice. Each side to bear attorney fees and costs. City does not waive any indebtedness that Mr. Jordan owes to the City & County of San Francisco.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
